themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "For Pentecost (Feast of Weeks), 'when ye bring a new meat offering unto the LORD... ye shall...". Cross references echo "Holy".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "In the fifteenth day of this month (בַּחֲמִשָּׁה עָשָׂר יוֹם, bachamishah asar yom)—Passover...". Word-study detail reinforces "לַחְמִ֜י: and my bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)".

themes.label: Obedience
